pi_items.source: Verified by extracting and parsing the Natural Earth 110m cultural shapefile (ne_110m_admin_0_countries.shp) directly to ensure the Kenya feature exists within the NAME/ADMIN attribute fields.
Task instruction specifies this export path. Confirmed that export_result.sh and verifier.py explicitly copy and assess this exact file path.
Task description mandates exporting to EPSG:32737. The verifier.py strictly checks the shapefiles generated PRJ for this code and its corresponding name.
Verified via pyproj CRS registry that EPSG code 32737 formally translates to the name WGS 84 / UTM zone 37S.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires extracting the country Kenya from the real public domain Natural Earth ne_110m_admin_0_countries dataset. The target Coordinate Reference System (CRS) is definitively EPSG:32737, which corresponds to WGS 84 / UTM zone 37S, and the expected exported shapefile path is /home/ga/gvsig_data/exports/kenya_utm.shp.
